user.title: Connect to Local Trailer Hire
user.description: Sign in with your localtrailerhire.com.au account. Use the same email and password you use on the website.

data_description.refresh_token: Optional. Use this instead of email/password if you have a token from a prior session.

options.title: Configure Options
options.description: Configure update interval and display options. Bookings are categorized by dates: upcoming (start >= now), in-progress (start <= now < end), past (end < now).

data.last_transitions: Transaction filter (optional, leave empty for all)
data.include_booking_lists: Include booking lists in sensor attributes

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch new booking data (1-60 minutes)
data_description.last_transitions: Leave empty to fetch ALL transactions (recommended). Only use if you need to filter by specific transitions.
data_description.include_sensitive_data: When enabled, includes full driver licence details and unmasked phone numbers. When disabled, licence is hidden and phone is masked (e.g. 0412****78).
data_description.include_booking_lists: When enabled, sensor attributes include full booking lists. Disable to reduce state size.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Authentication has expired. Please re-enter your localtrailerhire.com.au email and password.

error.missing_credentials: Please provide either username/password OR a refresh token

init.title: Configure Local Trailer Hire
init.description: Bookings are categorized by dates: upcoming (start >= now), in-progress (start <= now < end), past (end < now).

data.include_booking_lists: Include booking lists in sensor attributes

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch new booking data (1-60 minutes)
data_description.last_transitions: Leave empty to fetch ALL transactions and filter by dates only (recommended)
data_description.include_sensitive_data: When enabled, includes full driver licence details and unmasked phone numbers. When disabled, licence is hidden and phone is masked.
data_description.include_booking_lists: When enabled, sensor attributes include full booking lists. Disable to reduce state size.

leave_review.name: Leave Review
leave_review.description: Post a provider review on a completed booking.

transaction_id.name: Transaction ID
transaction_id.description: The UUID of the booking transaction.

transition.name: Transition
transition.description: Force review-1 or review-2; leave empty to auto-select.

config_entry_id.name: Config Entry
config_entry_id.description: Which Local Trailer Hire entry to use.
